extraction.one_line_summary: CORT won Stage 3 TTT by 1.4 seconds over Visma, taking yellow through first-rider-across timing rule exploitation
tactical_patterns: POGAČAR attacked own teammates in final 200m to steal GC seconds under first-rider-across timing rules
CORT's EF squad executed TTT pacing to finish 1.4s ahead of Visma despite weaker paper roster
VINGEGAARD gained seconds over POGAČAR through superior team TTT discipline, reversing individual GC attacking disadvantage

rider_signals.CORT Magnus: positive: Won TTT and yellow through pacing execution against stronger rosters, validates stage hunting instincts
rider_signals.POGAČAR Tadej: neutral: Attacked teammates for GC seconds but UAE TTT 20s slower than YATES's Jayco
rider_signals.VINGEGAARD Jonas: positive: Visma TTT cohesion 4s faster than Jayco, gained GC time on POGAČAR despite individual weakness
rider_signals.YATES Simon: positive: Jayco TTT 43s faster than Lotto baseline, led until final two teams
rider_signals.KÜNG Stefan: positive: Gave GAUDU armchair ride in UAE TTT, world TT champion value in hybrid format
rider_signals.SKJELMOSE Mattias: negative: Attacked for yellow defense bonus but Bahrain finished eighth, insufficient TTT support
